host.title: CCU Address
host.description: IP address or hostname of the CCU.

regaEnabled.title: Enable ReGaHSS
regaEnabled.description: Enable the ReGaHSS interface for variables and programs.

regaPoll.title: Enable ReGa Poll
regaPoll.description: Enable periodic polling of ReGa variables and programs.

regaInterval.title: ReGa Poll Interval (s)
regaInterval.description: Polling interval in seconds for ReGa updates.

rpcPingTimeout.title: RPC Ping Timeout (s)
rpcPingTimeout.description: Timeout in seconds used for RPC ping checks.

rpcInitAddress.title: RPC Init Address
rpcInitAddress.description: Address advertised to CCU for callback listeners.

rpcServerHost.title: RPC Listen Address
rpcServerHost.description: Local address used by RPC callback listeners.

rpcBinPort.title: BINRPC Listen Port
rpcBinPort.description: BINRPC listener port for CCU callbacks.

rpcXmlPort.title: XMLRPC Listen Port
rpcXmlPort.description: XMLRPC listener port for CCU callbacks.

inSecure.title: Ignore Invalid TLS Certificates
inSecure.description: Allow invalid certificates for TLS connections.

authentication.title: Enable Authentication
authentication.description: Use username and password for CCU communication.

username.title: Username
username.description: CCU username used when authentication is enabled.

password.title: Password
password.description: CCU password used when authentication is enabled.

queueTimeout.title: Queue Timeout (ms)
queueTimeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds for queued RPC calls.

queuePause.title: Queue Pause (ms)
queuePause.description: Pause in milliseconds between queued RPC calls.

whiteList.title: White List
whiteList.description: Only the devices in the list will be exposed. If the list is empty, all the devices will be exposed.

blackList.title: Black List
blackList.description: The devices in the list will not be exposed. If the list is empty, no devices will be excluded.

debug.title: Enable Debug
debug.description: Enable debug mode for the plugin. Only for debugging purposes, not recommended for production use.

unregisterOnShutdown.title: Unregister On Shutdown
unregisterOnShutdown.description: Unregister all devices on shutdown. Only for debugging purposes, not recommended for production use.
